zh.title: 艾达币/美元技术分析：弱势震荡偏空
zh.content:
当前价格围绕0.145附近窄幅整理，整体仍受均线压制，趋势偏弱震荡，短线反弹力度有限，市场观望情绪较浓，延续整理概率较高。

MACD位于零轴下方并维持负值，动能柱略有放大，显示空头占优；均线系统下压，短期反弹易受抑制，整体偏弱，缺乏反转信号，需警惕下行延续。

下方支撑关注0.1438低点，上方阻力位于0.1473对应20日均线，区间突破前以震荡为主，需确认量能配合，再做判断，避免追涨杀跌。

操作建议以区间交易为主，反弹接近0.1473可考虑减仓或做空，跌破0.1438则顺势跟空控制风险，严格止损，避免频繁交易。

en.title: Cardano vs US Dollar Technical Analysis
en.content:
is currently trading at 0.145089, showing a largely flat 24-hour performance with only a marginal uptick. The structure suggests short-term consolidation after a mild downward drift from recent levels above the 20-day moving average. Price action is compressed between a narrow intraday range, indicating reduced volatility. Despite the lack of directional strength, the broader bias remains slightly bearish while price remains below the SMA(20).

Momentum indicators are limited, with RSI unavailable, but MACD reading at -0.00032933645 signals weakening upward pressure and persistent bearish momentum. The absence of a positive signal line reinforces caution, as trend confirmation is lacking. Price hovering near intraday highs suggests short-lived buying interest rather than sustained demand. Overall momentum structure favors sellers unless a decisive reclaim of the 20-day moving average occurs with volume support.

Immediate support is established near 0.1438, corresponding to the session low, which has so far held against downside pressure. A breakdown below this level could expose the asset to a gradual slide toward lower psychological zones around 0.1420. On the upside, resistance is seen at the 20-day SMA near 0.1473, followed by a stronger barrier around 0.1500, where previous supply has likely been concentrated.

Trading conditions favor a range-bound or cautiously bearish approach. Short-term traders may consider scalping between support and resistance zones, prioritizing tight risk management due to low volatility and unclear trend strength. A break above 0.1473 would be needed to shift bias toward recovery, while failure to hold 0.1438 increases downside risk. Position sizing should remain conservative until stronger directional confirmation emerges from momentum indicators.
